title: alisma plantago-aquatica proles graminifolium
intro: Alisma plantago-aquatica proles graminifolium, also known as the Chinese water plantain or aquatic alisma, is a plant species that belongs to the Alismataceae family. This aquatic plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Alisma plantago-aquatica proles graminifolium include its ability to treat edema, hypertension, and kidney disorders, as well as its potential to improve cardiovascular health and reduce symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Alisma plantago-aquatica proles graminifolium typically include dried roots or rhizomes that can be used to make teas, capsules, or tinctures.
